posts.author: kek_saved_the_world
posts.title: Alpha-Gal Syndrome (AGS) makes you allergic to mammal-related products, including red meat. It comes from a tick bite, and there's been a 100-FOLD INCREASE in cases since 2013, which has made a lot of people wonder what's really going on here...

twitter.content:
🇺🇸 A few weeks ago, Joe Rogan had Rep. Tim Burchett on his podcast, and they went fully down the Alpha-Gal rabbit hole.

Rogan mentioned reports of ranchers stumbling upon boxes of ticks on their property and brought up a close friend who developed AGS.

Essentially Alpha-Gal
